_comment: Example config for the cognitive/flow.audit.completeness workflow. Copy, rename, and customize per target repo, then pass its path as the workflow's required `config_path` input. Generic exclusions ship in the discovery script defaults and are UNIONED with `exclude_globs` below. Full schema: see the `inputs` block in orchestrators/flow.audit.completeness.yaml.
dynamic_patterns: DI container registrations, incl. assembly scanning (impl classes referenced only at registration, never by name)
Framework-routed handlers: controllers, message/event/pubsub handlers, callbacks (on*/handler/callback naming)
Reflection / string-key resolution (e.g. lazy-loaded modules referenced by a string key, not an import)
Generated abstract base classes with concrete subclasses (corroborate against any existing implementation guard test; do not contradict a known baseline)

application_context.application_type: web_app | api | cli | library | service | monorepo
